original_prompt:
In this repo is a static astro website. Apply the following feedback. Create a branch and a PR for it.

Hi Will, 

See below feedback on the website, sorry there's quite a bit but hopefully all easy changes.

n the public / industry facing material, Customer = consumer we visit, Client = Ovo, Waterplus etc

Main landing page

Logo 
you cant see 'Challenge - Innovate - Win ' .  Can you increase the size, thats an important part of the branding and culture we're creating?

Strapline
Changed this, it read like a client could simply use our platform to manage their agencies, when in reality, they cant.

'One platform to manage all your site visit requirements'

'Partner with Innov-8 and benefit from our panel of expert field agencies.
Implement workflows, allocate cases and track performance across your full portfolio of services.
We manage the agencies and the process — you get the insight and the outcomes'


Screen shot

Remove 'OVO', replace with Energy Supplier A - Overview
Change the 'In SLA' to 99.2%
Change Complaints to 'Agencies' anc volume '6'

Under Dashboard, change to 'Services, Agencies, Performance, Complaints, Exception management, Billing'

Agencies, - change dashboard 'Agency Ranking' to 'Top 3 Agency Ranking'
Agencies - change to Field Agency B, Field Agency D, Field Agency E 

Cases by Region - change to 'North West, East Midlands, South Wales, Scotland'


The Opportunity 
Change to  - 'Join the field services evolution'
Change to ' Managing multiple agency relationships across several services and geographies is complex. There's a better way to drive performance, visibility, and collaboration.


Block 1
Increased customer engagement & visit capacity 
Up to 50% greater customer engagement through our revolutionary allocation model,
backed by unrivalled visit capacity across our panel of leading UK field agencies — optimised to postcode level, for every service.

Untapped industry insight
See how your performance stacks up against direct industry peers and neighbouring sectors — all anonymised. Benchmark against best practice and refine your strategy with confidence
  
 
Block 3
Simplified data and supplier governance 
A single managed data interface replaces multiple point-to-point connections, reducing complexity and strengthening compliance in a regulated environment.
You can now focus on performance and driving excellence in your business


How it works

Change 'From case to completion' to 'Full end to end case management'

Change next text to' We position ourselves in between you and our panel of field agencies, delivering a data led strategy, overarched by our experienced teams collaboration' 

Changes include:

02 -  Allocate 
Cases are distributed to agencies at a postcode level, with up to 4 agencies in each postcode.  The allocation split is based on performance and capacity. 

04 Optimise
Agency performance is measured in 12-week cycles, at postcode level. Top performers are rewarded with higher guaranteed allocations in those postcodes for the following cycle — driving consistent improvement across our panel.
 
05 Quality Control 
All cases pass through our quality assurance framework, ensuring compliance to your standards.  Additionally, 100% of cases are scored against our voice analysists tool, producing a scorecard on the customer engagement.


Features
Change to 'Everything you need to manage your cases'

'Replace aged collections interfaces, spreadsheets, emails and manual processes with a single platform that gives every stakeholder the visibility they need. 

Blocks

Performance Dashboard 
Change to - Drill from service-level summaries down to individual agencies and regions. Live cases, complaints, and performance against your chosen drivers — all in one place.

Forecasting 
Change to - Take the guesswork out of forecasting new strategies, our team will show you what's currently being achieved by similar businesses to yourselves.

Data-Driven Allocation 
Change to - Cases are allocated based on agency performance rankings at postcode level, validated against live capacity — ensuring the best performing agencies always receive the highest share of work.

Quality Assurance 
Change to - Mandatory field validation on every case. Human quality reviews and AI-powered scoring ensure consistent quality across your agency panel.

Automatic Billing 
Change to - Invoices generated with full backing data, inclusive of agency challenge windows and dispute escalation processes.

Complete Audit Trail
Change to - Every state transition is logged with time / date stamp and the user, any case derailment of workflow is evidenced and proactively made available   


Who's it for

Change to - Whether you're an Energy Supplier, Water Retailer / Wholesaler, Bank / Lender, Debt Purchaser, Debt Collection Agency, Local Authority or just generally require site visits to undertake a task, Innov-8 gives you the platform to achieve your objectives.
  
(change to) For Clients
One integration = full panel of agencies and services 
Full visibility across all agencies and services 
Reduced / No ongoing procurement and onboarding costs 

(Change t)o For Agencies 
Access to new clients
Diversification opportunities, postcode by postcode (no big bang theory) 
Level playing field - data driven allocation


Remove For Innov-8 operatives 
 
500m industry 

Change to ' a 500m industry, ready for change.

Over 7 million cases are visited each year across the UK.  Innov-8 is leading the evolution of  field services, with both a Client and Agency 1st platform, raising the standards across all industries.

Change to 'Up to 50% customer engagement uplift'
Change '6+ industry sectors served' to '6+ Industry subsectors served'


Sectors 

Change to 'Built for ALL industries'
If your sending a field opertaive to a location to undertake a task, compliance standards matter.  We believe in best practice and innovation. 

Remove case vol.)

Block 1 - Energy - Residential and Commercial 
Live debt visits, including Welfare & vulnerability visits
Commercial debt visits, Occupancy verification  
Meter related visits
Warrant Services (pre payment, disconnection, faulty meter) 

Block 2 - Water - Household and Non Household 
Live Debt Household Engagement visits 
Retailer Live Debt visits / Temporary Disconnections
Non Houshold Warrant services (internal access - non payment, long term unread meters,Investigation, meter installation)
Occupancy verification 

Block 3 - Financial Services 
Mortgage Arrears 
Reconnection Visits 
Income and Expenditure / Pre Litigation 

Block 4 - DCA / Debt Purchase 
Reconnection Visits 
Pre Litigation 
Affordability Assessments 

Request a Demo - if we cant offer a demo, suggest changing to 'get in touch'

Footer

Change to' The panel management platform for UK field services. Data-driven allocation, collaboration, performance optimisation

Change to 'Innov-8 Management Limited'
